creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
   I find that the "tests" has been removed from the tarball. So, I
remove it from the Makefile. Here is a new patch. Thank you.

On Fri, 28 Dec 2007 22:00:10 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of net/pear-Net_Ping,
>
> Please note that PR ports/119121 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/119121
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
